item.title: About
item.description: Who I am a husband and father of two. I am an engineer, entrepreneur and computer scientist. I was born in France in the early 1980’s. Where I live in Lausanne, Switzerland. I also lived and worked in France, in Vietnam, in Malaysia and in the U.S. I have been working remotely or with distributed teams for 15+ years. What When I am not busy teaching my kids how to use a glue gun, I manage tech organizations, mostly building or turning them around.

item.title: Being a man
item.description: There is one rule, above all others, for being a man. Whatever comes, face it on your feet. ― Lan, in The Great Hunt, book 2 of The Wheel of Time by Robert Jordan

item.title: Calendar
item.description: I use a service called Calendly to give secure access to my calendar. Click here to open it and book a call.

item.title: Calendar
item.description: I use a service called Calendly to give secure access to my calendar. Click here to open it and book a call.

item.title: Home
item.description: If you landed on this page, then we probably are connected in some way. Mention your discovery next time we meet in person and I’ll buy you a drink. Or some chocolate. If we meet in France or Switzerland, definitely go for the chocolate. Until then, take care of yourself and the ones you love. Best, ML

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: Click here to go to my LinkedIn profile page.

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: Click here to go to my LinkedIn profile page.

item.title: Quotes
item.description: Collecting quotes is one of my guilty pleasures. The only criterion for a sentence to find its place in the list below is to make me think. The bar to pass is usually quite low. Consequently, the following criteria were not taken into account: Whether or not I agree with what is said 1. Whether the quote is apocryphal or not 2 3. Whether the author is fictitious or not 4.

item.title: Special effects in litterature
item.description: Quand on écrit une nouvelle, le budget est illimité. — Josiane Balasko, NIFFF
